description_long: This object is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a rectangular form and a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars, finished in a teal color. The radiator is mounted on a flat, light gray backing panel, which likely represents a section of wall. The horizontal bars are tubular and run the full width of the radiator, with a small gap between each, allowing for efficient heat dissipation. At the bottom right corner, there is a small metallic valve or control unit, suggesting manual or thermostatic operation. The side views reveal the radiator's slim profile and the supporting brackets that attach it to the backing panel. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A teal, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal tubular bars and a slim, modern profile, attached to a light gray backing panel. Features a small control valve at the bottom right.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the radiator with horizontal teal bars and a visible control valve at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim depth of the radiator and the supporting brackets connecting it to the backing panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the flat, light gray backing panel with no visible radiator features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the radiator's slim profile and mounting brackets.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom right, horizontally oriented
